agents.name: Orchestrator Agent
agents.description: Central coordinator that translates plain English into legal workflows, assigns tasks to sub-agents, and manages the global case state.

skills.name: plain_language_translation
skills.description: Translates user narratives into structured legal data.

skills.name: workflow_decomposition
skills.description: Breaks down a high-level legal goal into a sequence of agent tasks.

skills.name: case_state_management
skills.description: Maintains the global state of the case, including deadlines, filed documents, and current phase.

skills.name: user_approval_routing
skills.description: Presents finalized, verified documents to the user in plain English for final approval before filing.

agents.name: Intake & Strategy Agent
agents.description: Evaluates case merits, identifies claims/defenses, calculates statutes of limitations, and generates predictive outcomes.

skills.name: claim_identification
skills.description: Maps facts to specific causes of action or affirmative defenses.

skills.name: statute_of_limitations_calculator
skills.description: Calculates the deadline to file a claim based on the date of the incident and jurisdiction.

skills.name: jurisdiction_assessor
skills.description: Determines proper subject matter and personal jurisdiction.

skills.name: predictive_outcome_generator
skills.description: Generates a probability report of success based on historical case data.

agents.name: Research Agent
agents.description: Conducts deep legal research in primary databases and synthesizes findings into structured memos.

skills.name: primary_law_search
skills.description: Executes complex boolean and semantic searches across case law and statutes.

skills.name: precedent_identification
skills.description: Identifies the most controlling and factually similar cases.

skills.name: negative_treatment_flag
skills.description: Checks if a case has been overruled, distinguished, or criticized.

skills.name: memo_synthesis
skills.description: Compiles research into a structured legal memo with verified citations.

agents.name: Drafting Agent
agents.description: Generates pleadings, motions, and discovery requests formatted to specific local rules.

skills.name: pleading_generator
skills.description: Drafts Complaints and Answers based on structured case data.

skills.name: motion_generator
skills.description: Drafts procedural and dispositive motions.

skills.name: discovery_generator
skills.description: Drafts Interrogatories, Requests for Production, and Requests for Admission.

skills.name: local_rule_formatter
skills.description: Applies specific court formatting (margins, fonts, caption style).

agents.name: Review & Reflection Agent
agents.description: Adversarially tests drafted documents for logical flaws and missing counterarguments.

skills.name: logical_consistency_check
skills.description: Ensures all elements of a claim are addressed and supported by facts.

skills.name: counterargument_simulation
skills.description: Simulates the opposing counsel's likely response to identify weaknesses.

skills.name: pleading_deficiency_scan
skills.description: Checks if an Answer properly admits, denies, or claims lack of knowledge for every paragraph of a Complaint.

agents.name: Citation Verification Agent
agents.description: Deterministically verifies every citation against primary databases to eliminate hallucinations.

skills.name: citation_extraction
skills.description: Extracts all legal citations from a document.

skills.name: deterministic_case_verification
skills.description: Queries the primary database to confirm the case exists and the holding matches.

skills.name: bluebook_formatter
skills.description: Formats citations according to the Bluebook or state-specific style guides.

agents.name: Docket & E-Filing Agent
agents.description: Monitors court dockets, extracts deadlines, and executes electronic filing.

skills.name: docket_monitor
skills.description: Polls court APIs (e.g., PACER) for new filings on a specific case.

skills.name: deadline_extractor
skills.description: Parses court orders to extract specific deadlines and updates the calendar.

skills.name: efiling_preparer
skills.description: Converts documents to PDF/A, adds bookmarks, and applies OCR as required by courts.

skills.name: efiling_executor
skills.description: Submits the prepared package to the court's e-filing portal via API.

agents.name: Discovery & Evidence Agent
agents.description: Ingests user evidence, extracts themes, and manages discovery responses.

skills.name: evidence_ingestion
skills.description: Processes uploaded files (PDFs, emails, images) and extracts text via OCR.

skills.name: entity_theme_extraction
skills.description: Identifies key people, dates, and recurring themes in the evidence.

skills.name: privilege_log_generator
skills.description: Flags potentially privileged documents (e.g., attorney-client, spousal) and generates a log.

skills.name: discovery_response_drafter
skills.description: Drafts responses to opposing counsel's requests based on the ingested evidence.
